name: Trend Intelligence API
description: Cross-platform research synthesis engine. Query Reddit, X/Twitter, YouTube, and the web simultaneously for any topic, then receive structured intelligence with pattern detection, sentiment analysis, and engagement-weighted scoring.
longDescription: A synthesis engine, not just a scraper. Raw signals from Reddit, X/Twitter, YouTube, and the web go in — structured intelligence with cross-platform pattern detection comes out. The API identifies patterns that appear across multiple platforms, classifying them as Established (3+ platforms, high engagement), Reinforced (2+ sources, moderate engagement), or Emerging (single source, notable spike). Returns sentiment breakdown per platform, top discussions ranked by engagement, and emerging topics. All requests routed through US mobile carrier proxies (AT&T/T-Mobile) for maximum platform trust and reduced rate-limiting. Tiered pricing: $0.10 single-platform, $0.50 cross-platform (2-3 platforms), $1.00 full report (all 4 platforms).

endpoints.description: Cross-platform trend synthesis for a given topic

input.topic: string (required) - topic or keyword to research, 2-200 chars

output.patterns: TrendPattern[] — cross-platform signals with strength classification
output.sentiment: { overall, by_platform: Record<platform, { positive%, neutral%, negative% }> }
output.meta: { sources_checked, platforms_used, proxy: { ip, country, type }, generated_at }

endpoints.description: What is trending right now across platforms

output.trending: TrendingItem[] — { topic, platform, engagement, traffic?, url? }
